hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.spec.ts ]]; then echo "[hook] Running test: $FILE"; npx playwright test "$FILE" --project=chromium --reporter=list 2>&1 | tail -5; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.vue ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.ts ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.js ]]; then npx eslint "$FILE" --fix --no-warn-ignored 2>&1 | grep -v "^$" | tail -5 || true; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.spec.ts ]] || [[ "$FILE" == *.ts ]]; then grep -nE "(password|secret|api_key|token)\s*[:=]\s*["'\x27"](?!\{\{|process\.env)" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "::warning::Possible hardcoded secret in $FILE" || true; fi'

bash -c 'MODIFIED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep ".spec.ts$" || true); if [ -n "$MODIFIED" ]; then echo "\n⚠ Modified test files not yet verified:"; echo "$MODIFIED" | sed "s/^/  /"; echo "\nRun: npx playwright test --project=chromium"; fi'
